title: The Lost Canelled model kit
wikitext:
[]: The Lost/Canelled model kit             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Sun Dec 12, 2021 5:54 am Hello, in browsing 1999 shop, i found order to Zeruel model kit, but this Angel don't realsed as model kit, maybe you know, that this model kit has announced but later it a canelled... Link to the item series on www.1999.jp.com : https://www.1999.co.jp/eng/search?typ1_c=109&cat=gundam&target=itemseries&searchkey=Evangelion+(LM) More detailed link: https://www.1999.co.jp/eng/10019838 PS: This order dont has image, hmmm... this is sus...

[]: Re: The Lost/Canelled model kit             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Dec 12, 2021 8:21 am Not true actually, Zeruel was released as part of Bandai's LMHG line; not sure why 1999 has such an incomplete listing, but it definitely exists. Blog review of it built and painted Surugaya has one in stock currently, so if you want it, you could get it through a proxy shop (the blog this is from looks pretty sus, so I wouldn't be surprised if this goes down some day; lower quality pic below just in case, for posterity)

[]: Re: The Lost/Canelled model kit             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Sun Dec 12, 2021 10:15 am Ok, thansk for answer.
